stemHtml: An aircraft is on the approach to land and has just reported "CLIPPER 347, FINAL". Which of the following transmissions can it expect to hear next?

options.a: CLIPPER 347, RUNWAY 27 CLEARED TO LAND, WIND 290 DEGREES AT 10 KNOTS.
options.c: AIRPLANE CALLING, RUNWAY 27 CLEARED TO LAND, WIND 260 DEGREES AT 12 KNOTS.
